requirement_topic.en: IFC / EBRD Lender Technical Specifications for Internationally-Financed PV Projects
requirement_topic.zh: 国际融资光伏项目的IFC/EBRD出借方技术规范
requirement_topic.zht: 國際融資光伏項目的IFC/EBRD出借方技術規範

summary.en: Uzbekistan's large-scale PV build-out (ACWA Power, Masdar, and other internationally-financed projects) frequently involves IFC, EBRD, ADB, or similar development-finance lenders who appoint independent engineers and set lender technical specifications. These specifications typically demand IEC test evidence for inverters regardless of local O'zstandart minimums: IEC 62109-1/2 (safety), IEC 62116 (anti-islanding), and IEC 61727 (grid characteristics) are commonly required. Lender technical specs may also set minimum performance ratio requirements, SCADA standards, and operational warranties that exceed Uzbekistan domestic regulatory minimums.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦大规模光伏建设（ACWA Power、马斯达尔及其他国际融资项目）通常涉及IFC、EBRD、亚行或类似发展金融出借方，这些机构委派独立工程师并制定出借方技术规范。这些规范通常要求逆变器具备IEC测试证据，不论当地O'zstandart最低要求：IEC 62109-1/2（安全）、IEC 62116（防孤岛）和IEC 61727（电网特性）是常见要求。出借方技术规范还可能设定超过乌兹别克斯坦国内监管最低要求的最低性能比要求、SCADA标准和运营保证。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦大規模光伏建設（ACWA Power、馬斯達爾及其他國際融資項目）通常涉及IFC、EBRD、亞行或類似發展金融出借方，這些機構委派獨立工程師並制定出借方技術規範。這些規範通常要求逆變器具備IEC測試證據，不論當地O'zstandart最低要求：IEC 62109-1/2（安全）、IEC 62116（防孤島）和IEC 61727（電網特性）是常見要求。出借方技術規範還可能設定超過烏茲別克斯坦國內監管最低要求的最低性能比要求、SCADA標準和運營保證。

standards_or_laws: IFC / EBRD / ADB lender technical specifications for PV projects in Uzbekistan
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems
IEC 62116 — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures for utility-interconnected inverters
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IFC Performance Standards on Environmental and Social Sustainability (project-level)

summary.en: Chinese domestic PV project documents usually focus on local grid approval, GB/T 19964-2024 connection evidence, equipment type-test reports under GB/T 37408-2021, and domestic project acceptance. For internationally-financed Uzbekistan projects, the China-side dossier must be supplemented with IEC-scheme test evidence to satisfy lender independent-engineer review. A manufacturer holding both IEC 62109 CB and IEC 62116 reports is in a stronger position for Uzbekistan internationally-financed project qualification.
summary.zh: 中国国内光伏项目文件通常关注当地并网批准、GB/T 19964-2024并网证据、GB/T 37408-2021设备型式试验报告和国内项目验收。对于国际融资的乌兹别克斯坦项目，中国侧资料包必须补充IEC认证测试证据，以满足出借方独立工程师审查。同时持有IEC 62109 CB和IEC 62116报告的制造商在乌兹别克斯坦国际融资项目资格方面具有更强竞争力。
summary.zht: 中國國內光伏項目文件通常關注當地併網批准、GB/T 19964-2024併網證據、GB/T 37408-2021設備型式試驗報告和國內項目驗收。對於國際融資的烏茲別克斯坦項目，中國側資料包必須補充IEC認證測試證據，以滿足出借方獨立工程師審查。同時持有IEC 62109 CB和IEC 62116報告的製造商在烏茲別克斯坦國際融資項目資格方面具有更強競爭力。

gap.en: For internationally-financed Uzbekistan projects, inverter documentation must satisfy both O'zstandart national certification and lender independent-engineer IEC-based technical review. The gap between a China-only GB/T dossier and lender requirements is significant: missing IEC 62109, IEC 62116, or IEC 61727 test evidence, or inverter models not listed in a lender-approved equipment list, can block project financial close or commissioning sign-off.
gap.zh: 对于国际融资的乌兹别克斯坦项目，逆变器文件必须同时满足O'zstandart国家认证和出借方独立工程师基于IEC的技术审查。仅有中国GB/T资料包与出借方要求之间存在重大差距：缺少IEC 62109、IEC 62116或IEC 61727测试证据，或逆变器型号未列入出借方批准的设备清单，可能阻碍项目财务关闭或调试签收。
gap.zht: 對於國際融資的烏茲別克斯坦項目，逆變器文件必須同時滿足O'zstandart國家認證和出借方獨立工程師基於IEC的技術審查。僅有中國GB/T資料包與出借方要求之間存在重大差距：缺少IEC 62109、IEC 62116或IEC 61727測試證據，或逆變器型號未列入出借方批准的設備清單，可能阻礙項目財務關閉或調試簽收。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the project is financed by IFC, EBRD, ADB, or similar lenders that apply IEC-based technical specifications as a condition of lending
mandatory_status.cn: Project-specific under China domestic procurement; GB/T 37408-2021 type-test evidence may not satisfy IFC/EBRD independent-engineer requirements without IEC scheme test reports

source.publisher: International Finance Corporation (IFC), World Bank Group

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For internationally-financed Uzbekistan PV projects, IEC 62109, IEC 62116, and IEC 61727 test evidence is typically a lender hard requirement; GB/T-only dossiers should be supplemented before project financial close.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于国际融资的乌兹别克斯坦光伏项目，IEC 62109、IEC 62116和IEC 61727测试证据通常为出借方硬性要求；仅有GB/T资料包的应在项目财务关闭前予以补充。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於國際融資的烏茲別克斯坦光伏項目，IEC 62109、IEC 62116和IEC 61727測試證據通常為出借方硬性要求；僅有GB/T資料包的應在項目財務關閉前予以補充。
